---
title: CV - [First Name Last Name]
author: "First Last"
format:
  cv-typst: default
date: last-modified # use last-modified for auto update, or set a specific date (e.g. 2026-01-01)
date-prefix: "Last updated: " # leave empty ("") to hide the prefix, or set a custom text

# --- Sidebar data ---
sidebar:
  photo: "assets/img/placeholder.png"
  phone: "XX XX XX XX XX"
  email: "fname.lname@email.com"
  birthdate: "DD/MM/YYYY"
  city: "City, Country"
  nationality: "Nationality"
  website: "https://www.mywebsite.com"
# website-display: "My Website" # Optional: custom display text
  permit: "Driving License B"
  linkedin: "https://linkedin.com/in/username"
  linkedin-display: "\\@username" # Alternative text
  github: "https://github.com/username"
  github-display: "\\@username" # Alternative text

# --- Default style configuration ---
# --- Global Theme (Fonts, Colors) ---
cv-theme:
  main-font: "Poppins"  # Global font
  title-font: "Poppins"  # Global font for sidebar section titles
  text-font: "Poppins"   # Global font for sidebar text

  sidebar:
    title-color: "#2563eb"    # Blue (Section titles, photo border)
    text-color: "#1e293b"     # Dark gray (Main text)
    accent-color: "#64748b"   # Medium gray (Items)
    link-color: "#2563eb"

  main:
    title-color: "#2563eb"    # Blue (Main titles)
    subtitle-color: "#1e293b" # Dark gray (Subtitles)
    text-color: "#1e293b"     # Body text
    # link-color: none        # No default color → {color="..."} in markdown works
  headings:
    h1: 14pt    # Main heading (Education, Experience, etc.)
    h2: 11pt    # Subtitles (Position, Degree)
    h3: 10pt    # Details (Company, School, Dates)
    normal: 10pt # Body text
    # h4: 9pt   # Optional
    # h5-h6: 8pt # Optional

# --- Default Sidebar Configuration ---

sidebar-defaults:
  text-size: 9pt
  title-size: 11pt
  icon-size: 11pt
  title-after: 1em      # Space after section title
  item-after: 1em       # Space after each item
  section-after: 3em    # Space after each section

# --- Sidebar sections (order = display order) ---
sidebar-sections:
  - id: photo
    style:
      section-before: 2em
      photo-size: 100pt
      photo-radius: 50%
      photo-border: true          # true/false to show/hide border
      photo-border-width: 4pt     # Border thickness
      section-after: 3em

  - id: contact
    title: "Contact"
    items:
      - type: phone
      - type: email
      - type: birthdate
      - type: city
      - type: nationality
      - type: permit
      - type: linkedin
    style:
      item-after: 0em
      section-after: 3em
      #icon-color: "#ff9500"  # Orange icons for this section
      #icon-size: 10pt
      #title-size: 18pt


  #- id: networks
  #  title: "Networks"
  #  items:
  #    - type: linkedin
  #    - type: github


  - id: details
    title: "More Info"
    items:
      - "[Visit my website for more details about my background and work.]"
      - type: website
    style:
      text-size: 9.5pt

  - id: languages
    title: "Languages"
    items:
      - name: "[Language 1]"
        value: "[Level]"
      - name: "[Language 2]"
        value: "[Level]"
    style:
      text-size: 10.5pt

  # - id: certifications
  #   title: "Certifications"
  #   items:
  #     - name: "AWS Solutions Architect"
  #       value: "2023"
  #     - name: "Google Cloud Professional"
  #       value: "2024"
  #   style:
  #     text-size: 8pt

  - id: strengths
    title: "Strengths"
    items:
      - "[Strength 1]"
      - "[Strength 2]"
      - "[Strength 3]"
      - "[Strength 4]"
    style:
      text-size: 10.5pt

  - id: interests
    title: "Interests"
    items:
      - name: "[Interest 1]"
        subitems:
          - "[Sub-interest 1]"
          - "[Sub-interest 2]"
          - "[Sub-interest 3]"

      - name: "[Interest 2]"
        subitems:
          - "[Sub-interest 1]"
          - "[Sub-interest 2]"
      - name: "[Interest 3]"
    style:
      text-size: 10.5pt

  - id: skills
    title: "IT Skills"
    items:
      - category: "Languages"
        items: "[Language 1, Language 2]"
      - category: "Tools"
        items: "[Tool 1, Tool 2]"
    style:
      text-size: 10.5pt

cv-layout:
  sidebar-width: 30%      # Left column width (e.g. 30%, 5cm, 1fr)
  main-width: 2.5fr       # Right column width
  gutter: 1cm             # Space between columns
  sidebar-bg: "#f1f5f9"   # Left column background color (light gray)
  main-bg: "#ffffff"      # Right column background color (white)
  margins:                # Document margins
    top: 0.5cm
    bottom: 0.5cm
    left: 0.5cm
    right: 0.5cm
  timeline:
    dot-size: "2pt"    # Dot size
    line-width: "1pt"  # Line thickness
    # dot-color: "#ff0000" # Dot color (optional)
    # line-color: "#00ff00" # Line color (optional)
---

```{=typst}
#text(size: 14pt, weight: "bold", fill: rgb("#000000"))[First Name Last Name]
#v(0.15em)
#text(size: 18pt, weight: "bold", fill: rgb("#2563eb"),)[Job Title or Research Position]
// #line(length: 100%, stroke: 1pt + rgb("#2563eb"))
#v(0.5em)
```

::: {.block fill=rgb("#f1f5f9") inset="8pt" radius="4pt" stroke="2pt + rgb(\"#2563eb\")"}

**Objective: [Your professional goal]**

[Describe your background, motivations and what you are looking for.]

:::

# Education

::: {.timeline}

## YYYY - YYYY | [Degree Title]

*[Institution, City] | [Grade/Honours]*

[Description of the program content.]

## YYYY - YYYY | [Degree Title]

*[Institution, City] | [Grade/Honours]*

[Description of the program content.]

## YYYY - YYYY | [Degree Title]

*[Institution, City] | [Grade/Honours]*

:::

# Professional Experience

::: {.timeline}

## Mon. YYYY - Mon. YYYY | [Job Title]

*[Lab / Organization, City]*

[Description of the mission and tasks performed ([Project Name]).]

## Mon. YYYY - Mon. YYYY | [Job Title]

*[Lab / Organization, City]*

[Description of the mission and tasks performed.]

## Mon. YYYY - Mon. YYYY | [Job Title]

*[Lab / Organization, City]*

[Description of the mission and tasks performed ([Project Name]).]

## YYYY | [Experience Title] (X days)

*[Dr Name (Specialty), City]*

## YYYY | [Experience Title] (X days)

*[Institution, City]*

:::
